description: This file defines functions related to converting resident privacy settings into API responses, including privacy filtering based on user roles and relationships.

classes.name: ResidentProfileResponse
classes.description: A schema representing a resident's profile data with privacy filtering applied.

methods.name: PrivacySchema _privacy_to_schema(p: ResidentPrivacySettings | None)
methods.description: Converts ResidentPrivacySettings object into its schema representation, handling None values.

methods.name: ResidentProfileResponse to_privacy_filtered_resident_response( *, resident: ResidentProfile, viewer: AppUser, )
methods.description: Converts a ResidentProfile object into a privacy-filtered API response based on viewer permissions and privacy settings.

calls: PrivacySchema(show_phone=..., show_email=..., show_address=..., show_photo=..., allow_messages_from_residents=..., allow_messages_from_admins=...)

ResidentProfileResponse(id=..., user_id=..., full_name=..., unit=..., address_line1=..., address_line2=..., city=..., state=..., postal_code=..., phone=..., email_public=..., bio=..., photo_object_key=..., privacy=..., created_at=..., updated_at=...)

ctags.name: PrivacySchema
ctags.pattern: /^from src.api.schemas.schemas import ResidentProfileResponse, ResidentPrivacySettings as PrivacyS/
